title: The Test Is the Memory
big_statement: QA as team dialogue, organizational memory, and the answer to epistemic debt

title: Three Claims
bullets: Suite = the department's memory
Verification is dialogue, not monologue
Review turns output into warranted knowledge

title: A Test Is a Decision That Remembers Itself
bullets: Documents drift silently when wrong
Tests fail loudly — the only honest docs
figure_svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 1000 620" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><style>.p{opacity:1;animation:f .8s ease both}.p2{animation-delay:.4s}@keyframes f{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(12px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}</style><g class="p"><rect x="70" y="120" width="390" height="360" rx="14" fill="#1e222a" stroke="#9aa0ab" stroke-opacity=".3"/><text x="265" y="175" text-anchor="middle" fill="#9aa0ab" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="30">Documents</text><text x="265" y="250" text-anchor="middle" fill="#f2f0eb" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="26">Written once</text><text x="265" y="300" text-anchor="middle" fill="#f2f0eb" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="26">Read seldom</text><text x="265" y="360" text-anchor="middle" fill="#9aa0ab" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="26">Drift silently</text></g><g class="p p2"><rect x="540" y="120" width="390" height="360" rx="14" fill="#1e222a" stroke="#e8a13c"/><text x="735" y="175" text-anchor="middle" fill="#e8a13c" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="30">Tests</text><text x="735" y="250" text-anchor="middle" fill="#f2f0eb" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="26">Run every commit</text><text x="735" y="300" text-anchor="middle" fill="#f2f0eb" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="26">Re-assert forever</text><text x="735" y="360" text-anchor="middle" fill="#e8a13c" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="26">Fail loudly</text></g></svg>

title: Domain Knowledge, Crystallized
bullets: Customer with two addresses, apostrophe name
Order at midnight, quarter's last day
Rounding bug above one million DKK
People leave — the fixtures stay

title: How the Memory Grows
bullets: Writing a test is doing the understanding
Bugs are tuition → regression test + why
Blameless postmortems keep learning honest

title: Part Two
big_statement: Quality is a team property, not an individual virtue

title: The Oldest Rule
big_statement: Myers, 1979: never verify your own work

title: Dialogue With a Deadline
bullets: Verifier asks: how should this behave?
Tacit knowledge forced into words
Edge cases surface between two minds

title: Rumor With a Commit Hash
bullets: Author-only = bus factor of one
A second mind duplicates and hardens
Verification moves knowledge to the org

title: Part Three: AI Era & Epistemic Debt
bullets: Duplication outpaced refactoring — first ever
Generation got cheap; understanding did not
figure_svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 1000 620" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><style>.ln{stroke-dashoffset:0;animation:d 1.6s ease both}@keyframes d{from{stroke-dashoffset:640}to{stroke-dashoffset:0}}.lb{opacity:1;animation:f 1s ease both;animation-delay:1s}@keyframes f{from{opacity:0}to{opacity:1}}</style><line x1="200" y1="550" x2="820" y2="550" stroke="#9aa0ab" stroke-opacity=".3"/><text x="200" y="590" fill="#9aa0ab" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="24">2021</text><text x="760" y="590" fill="#9aa0ab" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="24">2024</text><line class="ln" x1="200" y1="175" x2="800" y2="400" stroke="#9aa0ab" stroke-width="4" stroke-dasharray="640" fill="none"/><line class="ln" x1="200" y1="430" x2="800" y2="370" stroke="#e8a13c" stroke-width="4" stroke-dasharray="640" fill="none"/><circle cx="200" cy="175" r="6" fill="#9aa0ab"/><circle cx="800" cy="400" r="6" fill="#9aa0ab"/><circle cx="200" cy="430" r="6" fill="#e8a13c"/><circle cx="800" cy="370" r="6" fill="#e8a13c"/><g class="lb"><text x="190" y="160" text-anchor="end" fill="#9aa0ab" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="24">Refactoring 25%</text><text x="810" y="405" fill="#9aa0ab" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="24"><10%</text><text x="190" y="440" text-anchor="end" fill="#e8a13c" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="24">Copy-paste 8%</text><text x="810" y="375" fill="#e8a13c" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="24">12%+</text></g><text x="510" y="70" text-anchor="middle" fill="#f2f0eb" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="28">GitClear: 211M lines analyzed</text></svg>

title: Output Is Not Warrant
bullets: Model tests its own code → green checkmark
A self-fulfilling prophecy is not evidence
Warrant needs an independent mind

title: Epistemic Debt
big_statement: Repaid later, with interest, at the worst possible moment

title: Tests Are the Brakes That Let You Drive Fast
bullets: Strong net = accept big AI changes quickly
Delete the process = drive without brakes

title: Five Honest Failure Modes
bullets: Coverage worship — review assertions, not %
Rubber-stamp review transfers no judgment
Gatekeeping nostalgia — organ, not toll booth
Outsourcing the organ hollows the learning
Individual scorecards kill the dialogue

title: Five Practices to Start This Sprint
bullets: Every prod bug → regression test + why
Review AI code and its tests together
Let behavior disputes end in a test
Rotate test and review ownership
Policy: nothing ships author-verified alone

title: Three Team Metrics
bullets: On a team dashboard — never personal
figure_svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 1000 620" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><style>.c{opacity:1;animation:f .7s ease both}.c2{animation-delay:.3s}.c3{animation-delay:.6s}@keyframes f{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(14px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}</style><g class="c"><rect x="50" y="180" width="280" height="260" rx="14" fill="#1e222a" stroke="#e8a13c"/><text x="190" y="260" text-anchor="middle" fill="#e8a13c" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="28">Same-bug</text><text x="190" y="296" text-anchor="middle" fill="#e8a13c" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="28">recurrence</text><text x="190" y="360" text-anchor="middle" fill="#9aa0ab" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="23">memory</text></g><g class="c c2"><rect x="360" y="180" width="280" height="260" rx="14" fill="#1e222a" stroke="#e8a13c"/><text x="500" y="260" text-anchor="middle" fill="#e8a13c" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="28">Time-to-</text><text x="500" y="296" text-anchor="middle" fill="#e8a13c" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="28">reproduce</text><text x="500" y="360" text-anchor="middle" fill="#9aa0ab" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="23">who-knows-what</text></g><g class="c c3"><rect x="670" y="180" width="280" height="260" rx="14" fill="#1e222a" stroke="#e8a13c"/><text x="810" y="260" text-anchor="middle" fill="#e8a13c" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="28">Tests added</text><text x="810" y="296" text-anchor="middle" fill="#e8a13c" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="28">per incident</text><text x="810" y="360" text-anchor="middle" fill="#9aa0ab" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="23">tuition → knowledge</text></g></svg>

title: What Remains
big_statement: Nothing enters on its author's word alone
